Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: neckties [300210068], neckwear [300209284], accessories by location above the waist [300211602], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Small neckties tied in a bow knot.
Corbata de cuerda delgada sujeta en la parte delante con un broche ornamental u otro utensilio
Kleine stropdassen die in een strik worden vastgeknoopt.
Kleine Halsbinde, die zu einer Schleife gebunden ist.
